subject: Invoice 60 days overdue
body: This is your final notice. Pay $8000 within 48 hours or we involve collections agency.

subject: Client threatening to leave
body: Our biggest client called me furious about the delays. They are cancelling the contract.

subject: Billing error charged twice
body: I was charged twice for my subscription this month. I want an immediate refund and explanation.

subject: Wrong item delivered again
body: This is the second wrong order. I want a refund and am filing a complaint today.

subject: Contract renewal at risk
body: Contract expires in 3 days and client is not happy. If issues not resolved we lose $500k account.

subject: Employee data exposed
body: Internal spreadsheet with employee salaries shared publicly accidentally. HR and legal need to act.

subject: Cease and desist notice
body: You are hereby notified to stop using our trademarked content. Failure will result in legal action.

subject: Subscription charged but access denied
body: Charged $299 for annual plan but account still shows free tier. Cannot access premium features.

subject: Campaign launch failed
body: Marketing campaign launched with broken links and wrong images. We wasted $20000. Fix today.

subject: Audit findings require action
body: External audit flagged serious compliance issues. Regulators notified. Must respond within 24 hours.

subject: Harassment complaint filed
body: Formal harassment complaint filed against senior manager. Legal and HR must convene immediately.

subject: Account hacked need help
body: Someone took over my account and changed email and password. Making purchases with my card.

subject: Major shipment lost
body: Shipment worth $30000 gone missing in transit. Client furious and threatening to cancel all orders.

subject: Payroll processing failed
body: Payroll did not process correctly. 150 employees have not been paid. Fix before end of day.

subject: SLA breach notification
body: SLA breached for third consecutive month. Initiating penalty clauses and reviewing the partnership.

subject: You ruined my event
body: Your catering service cancelled last minute without notice. You ruined my wedding. I want full compensation.

subject: Still waiting after 3 weeks
body: Submitted support ticket 3 weeks ago and heard nothing. This level of service is shameful.

subject: Product damaged on arrival
body: Laptop arrived with cracked screen and dented casing. Clearly mishandled. I want replacement immediately.

subject: Project deadline missed again
body: Third deadline your team has missed. Our launch delayed and we are losing money. Escalate now.

subject: Unauthorized use of our brand
body: Discovered you are using our logo and brand name without permission. Remove it immediately.

subject: Ad campaign targeting wrong audience
body: Paid ad campaign running for a week targeting completely wrong demographic. Wasted $15000.

subject: Fraudulent transactions on account
body: Five transactions on my account I did not make totaling $1200. Reverse them and block my card.

subject: No heat in building for 4 days
body: Winter and no heating for 4 days. Residents include elderly people and children. Fix today.

subject: Wrongful termination notice
body: Received termination letter despite clean record and no prior warnings. Consulting a lawyer.

subject: Price increase notice
body: Due to rising costs we are increasing prices by 12% starting next month. Please be advised.

subject: Deliverable quality not acceptable
body: Report submitted last week does not meet agreed standards. We need revised version by Friday.

subject: API breaking changes without notice
body: Latest API update broke our entire integration without any prior notice. Lost full day of work.

subject: Internet down for 5 days
body: Business internet down for 5 days. Lost thousands in revenue. Want compensation and a fix today.

subject: Account banned without reason
body: Account banned without explanation or warning. Done nothing wrong. Demand review and reinstatement.

subject: Completely wrong design delivered
body: Designs delivered look nothing like the brief we provided. Want full redo immediately.

subject: Discrimination complaint
body: Formally reporting discriminatory behavior from direct manager. Have documented evidence. Act now.

subject: Package lost for 3 weeks
body: Order stuck in transit for 3 weeks with no updates. Paid $150 and received nothing. Refund me.

subject: Investor pulling out last minute
body: Lead investor reconsidering the term sheet. Need emergency board call today.

subject: Wrong cargo loaded on flight
body: Customs inspection revealed wrong cargo loaded on international flight. This is a legal violation.

subject: Missing crucial project files
body: All files from shared drive folder disappeared. A month of work is gone. Need them restored today.

subject: Business line down for 2 days
body: Business phone lines down for 2 days. Missing client calls and losing business every hour.

subject: Data sync failing silently
body: Data sync with your platform failing for 2 weeks without alerts. Data is out of sync.

subject: Cannot cancel subscription
body: Tried to cancel subscription 4 times through app and website but keep getting errors. Still charged.

subject: Critical bug in production release
body: Version you shipped has bug corrupting user data under specific conditions. Need hotfix now.

subject: Payslip shows incorrect deductions
body: Payslip this month shows deductions I was not informed about. Total significantly lower than expected.

subject: Locked out of account before trip
body: Traveling internationally tomorrow and locked out of bank account. Need access urgently.

subject: Deprecated endpoint causing failures
body: You deprecated endpoint without notice and our integration broke completely. Restore old endpoint.

subject: Supplier sent completely wrong stock
body: Received 500 units of wrong product. Shelves empty and customers complaining. Fix today.

subject: Term sheet has major legal issue
body: Lawyer found clause giving investors unexpected majority control. Call needed today.

subject: Service cancellation after 5 years
body: After 5 years as loyal customer I am cancelling due to repeated failures and no accountability.

subject: Vendor overcharged by 300 percent
body: Latest invoice is 3x higher than agreed contract rate. Refuse to pay until this is corrected.

subject: Employment contract violation
body: Company violated terms of my employment contract regarding overtime compensation. Seeking legal advice.

subject: Data retention policy violation
body: GDPR request to delete my data submitted 45 days ago. Legal deadline was 30 days. This is a violation.

subject: False advertising complaint
body: Your product does not do what your advertising claims. This constitutes false advertising. Taking action.

subject: Hostile work environment report
body: Formally reporting hostile work environment created by department head. Multiple witnesses available.

subject: Unauthorized credit card charges
body: Found 8 unauthorized charges on my card from your platform over past 3 months. Dispute all of them.

subject: Health and safety violation
body: Multiple health and safety violations observed at your facility. Reporting to relevant authorities.

subject: Breach of confidentiality agreement
body: Your employee shared confidential project details with a competitor. This is a serious breach.

subject: Product recall notification
body: Safety defect discovered in batch 2024-B. Potential injury risk. Issue recall notice immediately.

subject: Whistleblower complaint
body: Formally reporting financial irregularities observed in Q3 accounting. Have documentation ready.
